commit_scope: Execute the Form-native ELF64/aarch64 executable through a Docker Linux/arm64 runner and record stdout/stderr/exit proof.

commands: bash scripts/agent-coord.sh claim form-native-elf-docker-runner "close runner gap: execute Form-native Android/aarch64 ELF under Docker Linux/arm64 and record stdout/stderr/exit receipt"
local_validation.notes: Docker Desktop was started after the missing runner was challenged. Docker reports a Linux/aarch64 server and alpine:3.20 reports aarch64. The focused Form-native executable proof remains 63 with fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way and 1 ok, 0 divergent. The metal-plane audit writes the Form-emitted ELF64/aarch64 executable, file(1) reports an ELF 64-bit LSB executable for ARM aarch64, and Docker Linux/arm64 runs it with stdout FORM ELF, empty stderr, and exit 42. Android device/emulator execution remains a separate target-specific physical receipt.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy performed for this local runner receipt slice.

phase_gate.reason: Local runner proof passed; CI, review, merge, and deploy remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The metal-plane audit no longer stops at executable shape when Docker Linux/arm64 is available. It executes the Form-native ELF64/aarch64 image and validates stdout FORM ELF, empty stderr, and exit 42.
test_flows: Emit the Form-native ELF executable bytes from form-elf-exec.
Inspect the executable shape with file(1).
Run the executable through Docker Linux/arm64 and require stdout FORM ELF, empty stderr, and exit 42.
